games.title: 1v1 LOL
games.description: Epic 1v1 battles in this competitive gaming experience. Build, fight, and dominate in real-time combat.
games.guide: Master the art of building and combat. Practice your aim, build structures quickly, and outmaneuver your opponent. Key tips: Always maintain high ground, manage your materials, and stay mobile.

games.title: 10x10
games.description: Challenge your mind with this addictive puzzle game. Place blocks strategically to clear lines and score big.
games.guide: Think ahead and plan your moves. Try to clear multiple lines at once for bonus points. The key to high scores is positioning blocks efficiently and avoiding dead zones.

games.description: The classic number puzzle that took the world by storm. Combine tiles to reach 2048 and beyond.
games.guide: Keep your highest numbers in one corner. Combine tiles strategically to create space. Focus on building towards 2048 while maintaining board control.

games.title: Snake Game
games.description: The timeless classic Snake game. Eat food, grow longer, and avoid hitting walls and yourself.
games.guide: Start slow and plan your path. Avoid creating situations where you trap yourself. Use the edges strategically to navigate the board safely.

games.title: Flappy Bird
games.description: Navigate a bird through pipes in this challenging arcade game. Simple controls, addictive gameplay.
games.guide: Tap to fly up, release to fall. Time your taps carefully to navigate through the pipes. Practice makes perfect - this game rewards consistency.

games.title: Tetris
games.description: The legendary Tetris game. Stack falling blocks and clear lines to achieve high scores.
games.guide: Rotate pieces strategically. Keep the board level. Create opportunities for Tetris (4-line clears) for maximum points. Stay focused as speed increases.

games.title: Pac-Man
games.description: Guide Pac-Man through the maze, eating dots and avoiding ghosts. A true arcade classic.
games.guide: Learn the ghost patterns. Use power-ups strategically. Plan escape routes before eating pellets. Memorize maze layouts for better performance.

games.title: Space Invaders
games.description: Defend Earth from alien invaders. Shoot down waves of enemies and survive as long as possible.
games.guide: Keep moving to avoid enemy fire. Aim carefully before shooting. Destroy enemies in patterns to maximize efficiency. Stay alert as difficulty increases.

games.title: Breakout
games.description: Break bricks with a bouncing ball. Control the paddle and clear all blocks to advance.
games.guide: Position your paddle carefully. Aim for multiple brick hits per bounce. Use walls to your advantage. Try to hit bricks from different angles.

games.title: Chess
games.description: The ultimate strategy game. Play chess against AI or other players. Master the ancient game.
games.guide: Control the center of the board. Develop your pieces early. Protect your king. Learn basic tactics and openings. Practice endgames.

games.title: Checkers
games.description: Classic checkers game. Jump over opponents and become a king. Simple rules, deep strategy.
games.guide: Protect your back row. Create multiple jump opportunities. Plan ahead for king promotions. Control the center for tactical advantage.

games.title: Memory Game
games.description: Test your memory by matching pairs of cards. Improve your concentration and recall skills.
games.guide: Focus on card positions. Create mental maps of where cards are. Start with easier levels. Practice regularly to improve memory.

games.title: Sudoku
games.description: Solve logic puzzles with numbers. Fill grids following Sudoku rules. Challenge your brain.
games.guide: Start with cells that have limited options. Use elimination techniques. Look for patterns in rows, columns, and boxes. Take breaks if stuck.

games.title: Crossword Puzzle
games.description: Solve crossword puzzles and expand your vocabulary. Classic word game entertainment.
games.guide: Start with easier clues. Fill in common words first. Use crossing letters to solve harder clues. Think of multiple word meanings.

games.title: Word Search
games.description: Find hidden words in letter grids. Relax and enjoy this classic word puzzle game.
games.guide: Scan horizontally, vertically, and diagonally. Look for word patterns. Start with longer words. Use the word list as a guide.

games.title: Tic Tac Toe
games.description: The classic three-in-a-row game. Play against AI or friends. Quick and fun.
games.guide: Control the center square. Create two winning threats. Block opponent's winning moves. Play corners strategically.

games.title: Connect Four
games.description: Drop pieces to connect four in a row. Strategic gameplay against AI or friends.
games.guide: Control the center columns. Create multiple threats. Block opponent's winning moves. Think ahead multiple moves.

games.title: Hangman
games.description: Guess the word before the hangman is complete. Classic word guessing game.
games.guide: Start with common letters like E, A, R. Look for patterns. Think of common words. Use vowels strategically.

games.title: 2048 Variations
games.description: Explore variations of the popular 2048 game with new twists and challenges.
games.guide: Master the original 2048 first. Learn new mechanics in variations. Adapt your strategy to different game modes.

categories.description: Brain-teasing games that challenge your logic and problem-solving skills
